6.0.reason: Not listed in the official FLAC3D 6.0 command indexes.

7.0.reason: Not listed in the official FLAC3D 7.0 contents command index.

keywords.name: center
keywords.description: Create a rectangle from a center location v1 to a corner v2 .

keywords.name: point-1
keywords.description: if the first two points are specified, create a rectangle using two opposite corners. if the third point is specified, create a rectangle using two adjacent corners and a point on the opposite side.
